ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the tournament is held */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "tournament_type" TEXT /* Type of the tournament (individual or team-based) */,
  "tournament_format" TEXT /* Format of the tournament (single-day or multi-day) */,
  "tournament_rules" TEXT /* Rules of the tournament (catch-and-release or catch-and-keep) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information of the participant */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team the participant belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_team_name FOREIGN KEY ("team_name") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the team is participating in */,
  "team_captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "sponsor" TEXT /* Name of the team sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that made the catch */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament where the catch was made */,
  "actual_weight" REAL /* Actual weight of the fish caught */,
  "total_fish" INTEGER /* Total number of fish caught */,
  "large_mouth" INTEGER /* Number of large mouth fish caught */,
  "small_mouth" INTEGER /* Number of small mouth fish caught */,
  "spotted" INTEGER /* Number of spotted fish caught */,
  "dead" INTEGER /* Number of dead fish caught */,
  "short" INTEGER /* Number of short fish caught */,
  "lunker_length" INTEGER /* Length of the lunker fish caught */,
  "lunker_weight" REAL /* Weight of the lunker fish caught */,
  "penalty" REAL /* Penalty points for rule violations */,
  "total_weight" REAL /* Total weight of the fish caught */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "score_entry_time" TEXT /* Time of score entry */,
  "score_entry_method" TEXT /* Method of score entry (manual or automated) */,
  "score_verification_status" TEXT /* Status of score verification (verified or pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_penalty FOREIGN KEY ("penalty") REFERENCES penalties ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fish_species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fish species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the fish species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the fish species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the fish species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the penalty */,
  "penalty_points" REAL /* Points deducted for the penalty */,
  "penalty_type" TEXT /* Type of the penalty (dead fish, short fish, or rule infraction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trophies" (
  "trophy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trophy */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament where the trophy was awarded */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the trophy */,
  "place" TEXT /* Place won by the team (e.g., 1st, 2nd, 3rd) */,
  "trophy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trophy */,
  "trophy_description" TEXT /* Description of the trophy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trophy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trophies_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trophies_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament sponsored */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "sponsorship_amount" REAL /* Amount of sponsorship provided */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information of the sponsor */,
  "logo" TEXT /* Logo of the sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsors_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the referee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the referee */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the referee is overseeing */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification level of the referee */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level of the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_referees_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)
